---
title: "power"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, fixest, furrr, here)

alpha <- 0.05 # Standard significance level
sims <- 400 # Number of simulations to conduct for each N
plan(multisession, workers = 4)
c_vals <- c(0.70, 0.78)
```


```{r}
test_sim_h1 <- function(N, c, tau_het = 0.2) {
  eff_N = N/2
  # Scale because H1 is estimated on half the data
  X <- MASS::mvrnorm(n = eff_N, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = matrix(c(1, c, c, 1), 2))

  # econ_pre: continuous moderator (standardized, ~N(0,1))
  econ_pre <- rnorm(eff_N)

  Y0 <- X[, 2]
  Y0 <- Y0 / sd(Y0)

  results <- map_dfr(1:sims, \(i) {
    ap <- rbinom(eff_N, 1, 0.5)  # article_positive

    # DGP: Y = Y0 + tau_het * (ap * econ_pre) + noise
    # For optimists (high econ_pre), article effect is smaller
    # For pessimists (low econ_pre), article effect is larger
    err <- rnorm(eff_N, 0, 1)
    Y <- Y0 + tau_het * ap * econ_pre + err

    d <- data.frame(Y = Y, Y0=Y0,X = X[, 1], ap = ap, econ_pre = econ_pre)

    fit <- lm(Y ~ ap *  econ_pre + X, data = d)
    cs <- coef(summary(fit))

    list(
      'h1.sig' = cs["ap:econ_pre", "Pr(>|t|)"] <= alpha,
      'h1.est' = cs["ap:econ_pre", "Estimate"],
      'r2' = (feols(Y0 ~ X, data = d) %>% fitstat(type='r2'))$r2
    )
  })
  list(
    h1.power = mean(results$h1.sig),
    h1.est = mean(results$h1.sig),
    N = N,
    tau_het = tau_het,
    r2 = mean(results$r2),
    c_val = c
  )
}

df_h1 <- future_map_dfr(seq(500, 2500, 100), \(Na) {
  map_dfr(c_vals, \(cv) {
    map_dfr(c(0.20, 0.3, 0.15), \(th) {
      test_sim_h1(N = Na, c = cv, tau_het = th)
    })
  })
}, .options = furrr_options(seed = 457)) %>%
  mutate(
    name = "Article Backlash (H1)",
    value = h1.power,
    r2 = factor(round(r2, 1)),
    effect_size = factor(tau_het),
  ) %>%
  select(N, name, value, r2, effect_size, c_val)
```

```{r}
tau2 <- 0
test_sim <- function(N, c, tau=0.2) {
  X <- MASS::mvrnorm(n=N, mu=c(0, 0), Sigma=matrix(c(1, c, c, 1), 2))
  err <- rnorm(n = N, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  Y0 <- X[, 2]
  Y0 <- Y0 / sd(Y0)
  # Y1 is positive article, negative comments.
  Y1 <- Y0 + tau
  # Y2 is positive article, neutral comments
  Y2 <- Y0
  # Y3 is negative article, negative comments
  Y3 <- Y0 + tau2
  # Y4 is negative article, neutral comments
  Y4 <- Y0
  results <- map_dfr(1:sims, \(i) {
    negative.comments <- rbinom(N, 1, 0.5)
    negative.article <- rbinom(N, 1, 0.5)

    d <- data.frame(X = X[, 1], nc = negative.comments, na = negative.article) %>% mutate(
      Y0 = Y0,
      Y = case_when(
        nc == 1 & na==0 ~ Y1,
        nc == 0 & na ==0 ~ Y2,
        nc == 1 & na==1 ~ Y3,
        nc == 0 & na==1 ~ Y4,
      )
    )
    fit.sim <- lm(Y ~ nc * na + X, data = d)
    list(
      'h1.sig' = coef(summary(fit.sim))["nc", "Pr(>|t|)"] <= alpha,
      'h2.sig' = coef(summary(fit.sim))["nc:na", "Pr(>|t|)"] <= alpha,
      'h1.est' = coef(summary(fit.sim))["nc", "Estimate"],
      'h2.est' = coef(summary(fit.sim))["nc:na", "Estimate"],
      'r2' = (feols(Y0 ~ X, data = d) %>% fitstat(type='r2'))$r2
    )
  })
  list(
    h1.power = mean(results$h1.sig),
    h2.power = mean(results$h2.sig),
    h1.est = mean(results$h1.est),
    h2.est = mean(results$h2.est),
    N= N,
    c.raw=c,
    r2.emp = mean(results$r2),
    tau=tau
  )
}

df_mismatch <- future_map_dfr(seq(500,2500,100), \(Na) {
  map_dfr(c_vals, \(cv) {
    map_dfr(c(0.2, 0.3, 0.15), \(ca) {
      test_sim(N=Na, tau=ca, c=cv)
    })
  })
}, .options = furrr_options(seed = 123)) %>%
  mutate(
    r2 = factor(round(mean(r2.emp), digits=1)),
    name = "Mismatch Interaction (H2)",
    value = h2.power,
    effect_size = factor(tau),
    c_val = c.raw
  ) %>%
  select(N, name, value, r2, effect_size, c_val)
```

## Power for Triple Interaction (H4): Mismatch × Econ_Pre

```{r triple-interaction-power}
# Simulate power for the triple interaction: article_positive × comment_negative × econ_pre
# tau_het = effect size of the triple interaction (how much the mismatch effect changes per SD of econ_pre)
# tau_main = average mismatch interaction effect (can be 0 if we only care about het effect)

test_sim_het <- function(N, c, tau_het = 0.2, tau_main = 0.2) {
  # X[,1] is a pre-treatment covariate correlated with outcome (e.g., pre-treatment populism)
  # X[,2] is the baseline outcome
  X <- MASS::mvrnorm(n = N, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = matrix(c(1, c, c, 1), 2))

  # econ_pre: continuous moderator (standardized, ~N(0,1))
  econ_pre <- rnorm(N)

  Y0 <- X[, 2]
  Y0 <- Y0 / sd(Y0)

  results <- map_dfr(1:sims, \(i) {
    nc <- rbinom(N, 1, 0.5)  # comment_negative
    ap <- rbinom(N, 1, 0.5)  # article_positive

    # DGP: Y = Y0 + tau_main * (ap * nc) + tau_het * (ap * nc * econ_pre) + noise
    # The mismatch effect = tau_main + tau_het * econ_pre
    # For optimists (high econ_pre), mismatch effect is larger
    # For pessimists (low econ_pre), mismatch effect is smaller (or opposite)
    err <- rnorm(N, 0, 1)
    Y <- Y0 + tau_main * (ap * nc) + tau_het * (ap * nc * econ_pre) + err

    d <- data.frame(Y = Y, Y0=Y0,X = X[, 1], nc = nc, ap = ap, econ_pre = econ_pre)

    fit <- lm(Y ~ ap * nc * econ_pre + X, data = d)
    cs <- coef(summary(fit))

    list(
      'mismatch.sig' = cs["ap:nc", "Pr(>|t|)"] <= alpha,
      'mismatch.est' = cs["ap:nc", "Estimate"],
      'triple.sig' = cs["ap:nc:econ_pre", "Pr(>|t|)"] <= alpha,
      'triple.est' = cs["ap:nc:econ_pre", "Estimate"],
      'r2' = (feols(Y0 ~ X, data = d) %>% fitstat(type='r2'))$r2
    )
  })
  list(
    triple.power = mean(results$triple.sig),
    triple.est = mean(results$triple.est),
    N = N,
    tau_het = tau_het,
    r2 = mean(results$r2),
    c_val = c
  )
}

df_het <- future_map_dfr(seq(500, 2500, 100), \(Na) {
  map_dfr(c_vals, \(cv) {
    map_dfr(c(0.20, 0.3, 0.4), \(th) {
      test_sim_het(N = Na, c = cv, tau_het = th, tau_main = 0)
    })
  })
}, .options = furrr_options(seed = 457))

df_triple <- df_het %>%
  mutate(
    name = "Triple Interaction (RQ1)",
    value = triple.power,
    r2 = factor(round(r2, 1)),
    effect_size = factor(tau_het),
  ) %>%
  select(N, name, value, r2, effect_size, c_val)

bind_rows(df_h1, df_mismatch, df_triple) %>%
  mutate(R2 = round(as.numeric(c_val) * as.numeric(c_val), 1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = value, color = effect_size, lty = factor(R2))) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~name) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, lty = 3, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, lty = 3, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Power", color = "Effect size", lty = "R2") +
  theme_bw()
ggsave(here('figures/power.png'), width = 12, height = 4)
```
